title: Frailty in European Emergency Departments (the FEED study)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"89lkg","text":"This study will describe the prevalence of frailty and methods in use for its assessment in European emergency departments. This knowledge will inform population-attuned configuration of healthcare services and education. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Survey to determine site characteristics and availability of frailty-attuned healthcare services.
Cross-sectional study to determine the prevalence of older age and frailty in emergency care.
creator: James D van Oppen
